title: POPOYU Macaron Lilac Purple Balloons 18 inch Large Balloon, 5pcs Pastel Light Purple Big Thick Natural Latex Birthday Helium Balloons for Baby Shower Wedding Festival Kids Party Decorations
features: 🎈Package included: 5Pcs 18inch Macaron balloons, 8 colors to choose from Blue,Pink,Green,Yellow,Red,Purple,Grey and Orange. Give your family a colourful party.

🎈Party Balloons Nontoxic and Safe: 100% bio-degradable natural latex balloons , durable, beautiful, non-toxic, environmentally friendly and safe. Not easy to burst and 20% thicker than normal latex balloons.Each helium balloons has passed systematical test, ensuring the safety of your family.

🎈Easy to blow with air or helium: Balloons can be filled with air or helium. Filling with helium can make the balloon float. You can also use the air pump to inflate the air directly and hang it with tape. Please do not let the balloon inflate more than 18 inches to avoid overinflation. (Recommended to use inflate the pump!)

🎈For different occasions: Can be used for many kinds of parties and special occasions such as Birthday Party, Hen Party, Engagement, Wedding, Anniversary, Halloween, Christmas and New Year's Eve, Valentine’s day and BabyShower Party or any festivals.

🎈Safety and Use: Do not over-fill the balloons and avoid sunburn, overheating, sharp objects, and excessive friction. Strong winds or shots can cause a burst and are recommended for user over 14 years.
